2606.25964.title: WinDOM: Self-Family Distillation for Small-Model GUI Grounding
2606.25964.paper_summary: Small ($\sim$2B) GUI-grounding agents are attractive for on-device deployment, accessibility tooling, and low-cost iteration, but at this scale they face two open recipe questions: how to obtain bounding-box training data without expensive human annotation, and how to combine supervised fine-tuning with reinforcement learning. We address both, with the explicit goal of pushing small-model performance rather than scaling up. WinDOM is a $54{,}425$-record grounding corpus harvested by driving an open-source Windows 11 web reimplementation under headless Playwright, with bounding boxes read directly off the DOM and no OCR or human annotation. Self-Family Distillation (SFD) is a single rejection-sampling cold-start parameterised only by the teacher choice: either an EMA of the student (no external model) or a frozen larger same-family teacher. We then treat the saturation depth of the SFD cold-start as an explicit GRPO hyperparameter. On a Qwen3.5-2B student, the under-saturated cold-start is a better GRPO initialiser than the converged one: SFD-4B with Early-init RL gains $+5.4$ OOD-mean ($+3.5$ ScreenSpot-Pro, $+7.0$ OSWorld-G, $+5.8$ ScreenSpot-V2) over the base. The same-size EMA mode lands within roughly one OOD-mean point of the cross-size $4$B variant ($65.2$ vs $66.3$) without an external teacher.
2606.25964.paper_summary_zh: 小型（約2B）GUI基礎代理對於設備端部署、可及性工具和低成本迭代具有吸引力，但在這個規模下，它們面臨兩個未解的問題：如何在不需要昂貴的人類標註的情況下獲得邊界框訓練數據，以及如何將監督微調與強化學習結合。我們針對這兩個問題進行了研究，明確的目標是推動小型模型的性能，而不是擴大規模。WinDOM是一個包含$54{,}425$條記錄的基礎語料庫，通過在無頭Playwright下驅動開源Windows 11網頁重實現來收集，邊界框直接從DOM中讀取，沒有使用OCR或人類標註。自家庭蒸餾（Self-Family Distillation，SFD）是一種單一拒絕取樣的冷啟動，僅由教師選擇參數化：要麼是學生的EMA（沒有外部模型），要麼是凍結的更大同家庭教師。我們將SFD冷啟動的飽和深度視為一個明確的GRPO超參數。在一個Qwen3.5-2B學生模型上，未飽和的冷啟動比收斂的冷啟動更適合作為GRPO的初始化器：SFD-4B與早期初始化的RL相比，獲得了$+5.4$的OOD均值增益（$+3.5$ ScreenSpot-Pro，$+7.0$ OSWorld-G，$+5.8$ ScreenSpot-V2），超過了基準。同尺寸的EMA模式大約在一個OOD均值點內接近交叉尺寸的$4$B變體（$65.2$對$66.3$），且沒有外部教師。
2606.25964.author: Chengheng Li-Chen et.al.
2606.25964.authors: Chengheng Li-Chen, Zhiqian Zhou, Hao Chen, Nicolas Chauvin
